en: And just to get some visibility, if that's OK?
ko: 그리고 좀 보이게 해줄 수 있을까, 괜찮다면?
ja: もしよければ、少し見せてもらえないか、
zhTW: 如果可以的話，讓我看看，
vi: Va de co the nhin thay, neu ban khong phien,

en: Because I just heard that more tweaks have been made in my arena.
ko: 내 분야에서 더 많은 수정이 있었다고 들었어.
ja: 私の分野でさらに修正があったと聞いたので。
zhTW: 因為我聽說在我的領域有更多的調整。
vi: vi toi nghe noi co them nhung thay doi trong linh vuc cua toi.

en: It's cool. OK, well, if I could just take a quick peek.
ko: 좋아, 그럼 잠깐만 좀 볼 수 있을까?
ja: いいよ、ちょっと覗いてもいいか。
zhTW: 好吧，如果我能快速看一下。
vi: Duoc roi, de toi nhin nhanh mot cai.

en: Carl, man, it's not a good time. Oh, but then if you could just talk me through it.
ja: ああ、でも説明だけしてもらえれば、
zhTW: 哦，但如果你能跟我說明一下，
vi: A, nhung neu anh co the giai thich cho toi,

en: No, just so I'm comfortable in my own mind that I got your back.
ko: 아니, 그냥 내가 네 편이라는 걸 확신하고 싶어서 그래. 다 괜찮아, 칼. 알겠지?
ja: いや、君の味方だと安心したいだけなんだ。大丈夫だよ、カール。
zhTW: 只是讓我心裡踏實，我支持你。一切都好，Carl，好嗎？
vi: chi de toi yen tam la toi ung ho anh. Moi thu on ca, Carl, duoc chu?

en: It is all good, Carl, OK? It's all good. We really need just a second. Hang on.
ja: 本当に急いでるんだ。ちょっと待って。
zhTW: 我們真的很趕。等一下，等一下。
vi: Chung toi thuc su can gap. Cho mot chut, doi da.

en: It's not a good time, Carl. Oh, really? Well, listen to me.
ja: ああ、本当に？じゃあ聞いてくれ。
vi: A, that sao? Vay nghe toi noi nay.

en: I took a lot of shit from your dad because we've been through the mill,
ja: お前の親父にはさんざんやられたよ
zhTW: 我從你爸那裡受了不少氣
vi: Toi da chiu nhieu tu ong cu cua cau

en: but I've been a CFO at major public companies for over two decades, and I know a thing or two about a thing or two.
ko: 하지만 난 주요 상장 회사에서 CFO를 맡아 왔어.
ja: いろいろなことを知ってるんだ。
vi: Toi cung biet doi dieu ve moi thu.

en: And if you fuck up his deal or you try to stand up numbers that I am not comfortable with, I swear to God.
ko: 내가 불안한 숫자를 제시하려고 한다면, 맹세할게.
ja: おい、落ち着け、落ち着け。

en: CFO. What, are you going to fire your chief financial officer a week in?

ja: お前は完全に終わりだ。
vi: Cau se xong doi cho ma xem.

ja: お前は俺の弱みを握ってるが、俺もお前のを握ってるぞ、ケン。
zhTW: 你捏著我的把柄，Ken，但我也捏著你的。
vi: Cau nam duoc diem yeu cua toi, Ken, nhung toi cung nam duoc cua cau.

en: You have my dick in your hand, Ken, but I've got yours in mine.
ko: 너는 내 걸 쥐고 있지만, 나는 네 걸 쥐고 있어.
